name: Glima AI
description: Glima AI is an all-in-one AI creative platform for generating, editing, and enhancing images and videos using advanced artificial intelligence models.

name: How to Use the AI Sports Logo Generator

step.name: Enter Your Team or Brand Name
step.text: Type in the name of your sports team or brand, and optionally add a tagline to incorporate into your logo design.

step.name: Choose Sport and Style
step.text: Select the sport (football, basketball, baseball, etc.) and the design style (modern, classic, minimalist, bold) that best represents your team’s identity.

step.name: Generate and Customize
step.text: Click 'Generate,' let the AI craft your custom logo, and fine-tune colors, fonts, and icons as needed.
